categories.name: Repair
categories.description: Product defects requiring fix, replacement, or technical intervention.

categories.name: Logistics
categories.description: Issues from packaging, delivery, and shipping process.

categories.name: Security
categories.description: Account safety, fraud, and unauthorized access concerns.

categories.name: Marketing
categories.description: Expectation mismatch between product listing and received item.

severity_guidance.low: Minor inconvenience; workaround available; no immediate risk.
severity_guidance.medium: Partial impact on product use or customer trust.
severity_guidance.high: Major impact on use, value, or repeat purchase likelihood.
severity_guidance.critical: Safety, security, fraud, or severe financial impact requiring urgent action.
